author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(events): move to @algolia/events (#4961)
body:
* feat(events): move to @algolia/events

reasons:

- builtin type definition
- no need for synthetic default
- no overlap with a node builtin module
- [FX-611](https://algolia.atlassian.net/browse/FX-611)
- full control over the code, could minimise more easily
- https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/pull/883

* chore: remove wrongly implemented types

* update to cjs/esm compatible version

* update helper
